anguished_souls_elites.text: anguished souls elites elite monsters have the "anguished souls" affix and deal more damage.

astaroths_armageddon.text: astaroths armageddon meteors will constantly rain from the sky.

astaroths_loyal_steed.text: astaroths loyal steed astaroth is immune to damage upon reaching each health threshold until the amalgam of rage is killed.

avengers.text: avengers killing a monster enrages monsters near it after a short delay, making them deal more damage.

berserker_elites.text: berserker elites elite monsters have the "berserker" affix and deal more damage.

blood_blisters.text: blood blisters killing a monster has a chance to spawn a blood blister. after a short delay, it explodes, dealing heavy area damage.

cannibal_horde.text: cannibal horde foul cannibals have defiled this place and additionally gain extra life.

cultist_horde.text: cultist horde corrupted fanatics worship within this place and additionally gain extra life.

dark_omen.text: dark omen this place is not right. someone, or something, stalks you here...

deathly_shadows.text: deathly shadows killing a monster has a chance to unleash a volatile pulse after a short delay, dealing heavy area damage.

demon_horde.text: demon horde vile hellspawn have conquered this place and additionally gain extra life.

drifting_shades.text: drifting shades drifting shades chase players. on contact, they explode for heavy damage and create a nightmare field that dazes victims.

elemental_totems.text: elemental totems while in combat, random elemental totems appear that buff nearby enemies until destroyed.

empowered_elites_cold_enchanted.text: empowered elites cold enchanted elites always have the "cold enchanted" affix.

empowered_elites_shadow_enchanted.text: empowered elites shadow enchanted elites always have the "shadow enchanted" affix.

empowered_elites_teleporter.text: empowered elites teleporter elites always have the "teleporter" affix.

explosive_elites.text: explosive elites elite monsters have the "explosive" affix and deal more damage.

frenzied_elites.text: frenzied elites elite monsters have the "frenzied" affix and deal more damage.

hellfire.text: hellfire monsters are afflicted with hellfire, which transfers to players when killed. hellfire increases damage, but deals damage overtime for each stack. using a potion helps alleviate hellfire with a fiery explosion.

illusory_elites.text: illusory elites elite monsters have the "illusory" affix and deal more damage.

infested_elites.text: infested elites elite monsters have the "infested" affix and deal more damage.

insect_horde.text: insect horde pestilent bugs have infested this place and additionally gain extra life.

khazra_horde.text: khazra horde braying goatmen have inhabited this place and additionally gain extra life.

lambs_to_slaughter.text: lambs to slaughter lure captured enemies to the shrine to sacrifice them for additional rewards.

leaping_amalgam.text: leaping amalgam the amalgam of rage will now continue its pounce attacks after astaroth dismounts.

lightning_storm.text: lightning storm lightning gathers above the player. get into the protection dome to avoid severe outcomes.

meteor_storm.text: meteor storm astaroth now has more meteor attacks.

nightmare_portal.text: nightmare portal while in combat, nightmare portals open randomly near players, pouring out dangerous monsters.

poison_enchanted_elites.text: poison enchanted elites elite monsters have the "poison enchanted" affix and deal more damage.

profane_aegis.text: profane aegis monsters gain of their maximum life as a barrier.

rage_of_the_pack.text: rage of the pack the amalgam of rage now summons elite werewolves.

raging.text: raging monsters here are reckless, receiving and dealing more damage.

splitter_elites.text: splitter elites elite monsters have the "splitter" affix and deal more damage.

suppressor_elites.text: suppressor elites elite monsters have the "suppressor" affix and deal more damage.

teleport_residue.text: teleport residue astaroth now leaves behind a pool of persistent damage when teleporting.

the_beast_in_ice.text: the beast in ice face a more challenging beast in ice at the end of this frozen cave.

undead_horde.text: undead horde desecrated undead have risen within this place and additionally gain extra life.

vampiric_elites.text: vampiric elites elite monsters have the "vampiric" affix and deal more damage.

veiled_elites.text: veiled elites elite monsters have the "veiled" affix and deal more damage.

volcanic.text: volcanic while in combat, gouts of flame periodically erupt near players.

waller_elites.text: waller elites elite monsters have the "waller" affix and deal more damage.

backstabbers.text: backstabbers close monster attacks from behind cause you to become vulnerable.

barrier_breakers.text: barrier breakers monsters deal more damage to barriers.
